zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Joan Bruley于大约1400年出生在英国时，她的父亲John Bruley19岁，母亲Matilda Quartermain23岁。她和John d'Anvers II至少有5个儿子和6个女儿。她去世在她的家乡。

nameMeanings.name: Bruley
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Altered form of French Brûlé (see Brule ). This surname is also found in Britain, where it is of Huguenot origin.

variants.name: Brule
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  French Fernand, Lucien, Andre, Laurent, Marcel, Monique, Normand, Phillippe, Pierre, Raoul, Yvan, Yves.

topographic name for someone living in a place cleared for use by burning, from brûlé ‘burnt’ (Old French bruslé, past participle of brusler ‘to burn’). Some instances of the name may derive from the same word used with reference to disfigurement by burning, either accidentally or as a medieval ordeal or punishment.

nameMeanings.name: Joan
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Contracted form of Old French Jo(h)anne, from Latin Io(h)anna ( see Joanna ). In England this was the usual feminine form of John from the Middle English period onwards and was extremely popular, but in the 16th and 17th centuries it steadily lost ground to Jane . It was strongly revived in the first part of the 20th century, partly under the influence of George Bernard Shaw's play St Joan ( 1923 ), based on the life of Joan of Arc ( 1412–31 ). Claiming to be guided by the voices of the saints, she persuaded the French dauphin to defy the occupying English forces and have himself crowned, and she led the French army that raised the siege of Orleans in 1429 . The following year she was captured by the Burgundians and sold to the English, and a year later she was burned at the stake for witchcraft at the age of 18 or 19. Her story has captured the imagination of many writers, and she is variously portrayed as a national and political hero, a model of apolitical straightforwardness and honesty, and a religious heroine. She was canonized in 1920 . More recent influences have included the American film actress Joan Crawford ( 1908–77 , born Lucille le Sueur ), the British actress Joan Collins ( b. 1933 ), the American comedienne Joan Rivers ( b. 1933 ), and the West Indian pop singer Joan Armatrading ( b. 1950 ).

variants.name: John
meanings: As a boy's name this represents a revival of Middle English Jan, a by‐form of John , or an adoption of the common European form with this spelling. As a girl's name it is a short form of names such as Janet and Janice .

historicEvents.title: Wars of the Roses
historicEvents.description: Wars of the Roses was a series of English civil wars for control of the throne of England between the royal families House of Lancaster and the House of York. The name of the war was derived as the red rose was the symbol of the Lancastrians and the white rose was the symbol of the Yorks.

en.lifeSummary: When Joan Bruley was born about 1400, in England, her father, John Bruley, was 19 and her mother, Matilda Quartermain, was 23. She had at least 5 sons and 6 daughters with John d'Anvers II. She died in her hometown.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Joan Bruley est née environ 1400, à Angleterre, son père, John Bruley, avait 19 ans et sa mère, Matilda Quartermain, avait 23 ans. Elle a eu au moins 5 fils et 6 filles avec John d'Anvers II. Elle est décédée dans sa ville natale.

de.lifeSummary: Als Joan Bruley um 1400 in England geboren wurde, war ihr Vater John Bruley 19 und ihre Mutter Matilda Quartermain 23. Sie hatte mit John d'Anvers II mindestens 5 Söhne und 6 Töchter. Sie starb in ihrem Geburtsort.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Joan Bruley è nata il circa 1400 nel England, sua padre, John Bruley, aveva 19 anni e sua madre, Matilda Quartermain, aveva 23 anni. Lei avuto almeno 5 figli e 6 figlie con John d'Anvers II. Morì nel sua cittadina.

ja.lifeSummary: Joan Bruleyが約1400年にイギリスで生まれた時，父John Bruleyは19歳，母Matilda Quartermainは23歳であった。彼女はJohn d'Anvers IIとの間に少なくとも5人の息子と6人の娘をもうけた。彼女は故郷で死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: Joan Bruley(이)가 대략 1400년 영국에서 태어났을 때, 그녀의 아버지 John Bruley(은)는 19세였고, 그녀의 어머니 Matilda Quartermain(은)는 23세였다. 그녀는 John d'Anvers II(와)과 적어도 다섯 명의 아들과 여섯 명의 딸을 두었다. 그녀는 그녀의 고향에서 사망했다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Joan Bruley nasceu aproximadamente 1400, em Inglaterra, seu pai, John Bruley, tinha 19 anos e sua mãe, Matilda Quartermain, tinha 23 anos. Ela teve pelo menos 5 filhos e 6 filhas com John d'Anvers II. Ela faleceu em sua cidade natal.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Joan Bruley родилась около 1400 г. в местности Англия, её отцу по имени John Bruley было 19 лет, а матери, которую звали Matilda Quartermain, 23. У неё было по крайней мере 5 сыновей и 6 дочерей от John d'Anvers II. Она умерла в её родном городе.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Joan Bruley nació aproximadamente 1400, en Inglaterra, su papá, John Bruley, tenía 19 años y su mamá, Matilda Quartermain, tenía 23 años. Tuvo por lo menos 5 hijos y 6 hijas con John d'Anvers II. Murió en su pueblo.
